channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Zcash teams propose Ironwood pool to restore supply verification after Orchard flaw
item.description: Ironwood would close the old Orchard pool to new activity and route funds through a turnstile before they enter a new shielded pool.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Arthur Hayes dumps WLD days after Maelstrom’s AI IPO pitch
item.description: Maelstrom’s Arthur Hayes has been on a selling spree recently, offloading positions in HYPE, ZEC, NEAR and now WLD.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Galaxy drops CLARITY Act odds to 60% as time is running out
item.description: Galaxy Digital says the Senate has a tight calendar ahead of the November elections, and the time needed to fix up and pass a key crypto bill is quickly fading.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Tokenization firm Securitize clears key SEC hurdle for NYSE listing
item.description: The firm announced that the US securities regulator has declared its S-4 registration statement effective, bringing it closer to a SPAC merger with Cantor Equity Partners II.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Justin Sun’s HTX delists Trump family’s USD1 amid freeze fight
item.description: HTX said World Liberty froze its addresses and has responded by delisting and suspending the platform’s token.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: What happens to Bitcoin if Nasdaq falls further?
item.description: Bitcoin eyes a rally toward $92,630 as BTC defends key long-term support while the Nasdaq flashes deeper correction risks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Strategy’s Saylor signals BTC buy as preferred dividend pay date vote looms
item.description: Strategy’s top execs took to social media on Sunday to tout its Bitcoin strategy while shareholders cast final votes on a proposal for twice-monthly preferred stock dividend payments.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Bitcoin risks new purge with bear-market losses still $35B below 2022 total
item.description: Bitcoin realized losses remained below the $211 billion tally from 2022, leading to a prediction that the next bear-market bottom was not yet in.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Bitcoin most oversold since 2020 crash: Can BTC rebound to $70K next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s latest oversold RSI mirrors 2020 and February 2026 setups that preceded 50% and 30% rebounds, putting $70K back in focus.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug, Bitcoin below $60K: Is $1.4K next?
item.description: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Travala lets AI agents book hotels with USDC on Base
item.description: Travala’s new protocol lets AI agents search and book hotels with USDC on Base, but travelers still approve the final payment.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Bryan O'Shea

item.title: Crypto tax proposals weighed ahead of Tuesday House hearing
item.description: Among the issues US lawmakers are expected to discuss in a digital asset taxation hearing are “de minimis” reporting exceptions for crypto transactions.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bitcoin bears face $2.6B trap as BTC funding rate drops: Is a short squeeze brewing?
item.description: Bitcoin bears piled into short positions as BTC price slid to $60,000. Will the $2.6 billion in short leverage lead to an upside squeeze?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Kraken offers SpaceX IPO access through xStocks
item.description: Eligible users in more than 110 markets can register for tokenized SpaceX equity ahead of the company's highly anticipated public listing.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Crypto tax in Illinois FY2027 budget is one step away from becoming law
item.description: The law, part of a budget plan passed by Illinois lawmakers, would put the burden of collecting a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions on a registered broker.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Crypto Biz: Nobody told Saylor ‘never sell’
item.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale challenged the “never sell” narrative, while JPMorgan attacked CLARITY and Capital B pursued a huge fundraising plan for BTC.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Pump.fun bounty platform pays users to tattoo tokens and chase viral stunts
item.description: Pump.fun launched a new bounty platform where users started funding bizarre memecoin marketing stunts, including forehead tattoos, skydiving as a mascot and setting a vehicle on fire.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Saylor says Bitcoin needs ‘disciplined expansion’ as analysts weigh demand reset
item.description: Michael Saylor’s essay calls for Bitcoin to expand through banks, credit, securities and higher layers while preserving its base layer.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Bitcoin teases 'seller exhaustion' as BTC price downside reaches $60.3K
item.description: Bitcoin sellers were losing steam, market analysis said as ongoing BTC price downside brought the market closer to $60,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Visa tests private stablecoin settlement with Brale, Canton
item.description: Visa is testing private stablecoin settlement on Canton with Brale, exploring whether institutions can use blockchain without exposing sensitive transaction data.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Zcash weighs new shielded pool after counterfeiting flaw
item.description: Zcash developers are weighing a new shielded pool and turnstile accounting after the Orchard bug raised supply verification questions.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Bitcoin needs one more thing to happen to spark BTC price 'rally:' Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin whales flipped to support a BTC price rebound, but analysis warned that the Coinbase and Kimchi Premium still needed to return.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: House GOP eyes summer vote on prediction market restrictions for lawmakers
item.description: House Republicans plan a summer vote on a congressional stock trading ban and new restrictions on lawmakers’ prediction market activity.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed Clearing House plans tokenized deposit network in 2027: WSJ
item.description: Some of the largest banks are reportedly launching a tokenized deposit network in early 2027 in response to growing competition from stablecoin companies entering TradFi.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: How low can Bitcoin price go if $60K support fails?
item.description: Bitcoin’s downside targets cluster near $50,000, but a larger weekly bearish setup puts a deeper correction toward $33,000 on the radar.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Forward Industries moves $32M in SOL amid $1B paper loss
item.description: Forward Industries moved $31.9 million in SOL to Coinbase Prime as its Solana bet sits over 70% underwater, underscoring growing strain on corporate crypto treasuries.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: South Korea police probe Polymarket users over illegal gambling claims: Report
item.description: South Korean police reportedly launched the country’s first illegal gambling probe into local Polymarket users amid election-betting scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Crypto billionaires bankroll Nigel Farage's pro-crypto party
item.description: Tether-linked billionaire Christopher Harborne and BitMEX co-founder Ben Delo donated $9.4 million to Nigel Farage’s Reform UK in the first quarter.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Strategy’s leveraged Bitcoin model has faced its first stress test: Grayscale
item.description: “Less Bitcoin on levered DAT balance sheets and more on diversified corporate balance sheets will be a positive,” said Grayscale’s head of research, Zach Pandl.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young
